revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Kingdom of Denmark]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Country data Kingdom of Denmark]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Danish Realm | flag alias = Flag of Denmark.svg | flag alias-viking = Raven Banner.svg | link alias-viking = Kingdom of Denmark (Middle Ages) | flag alias-estridsen = Royal Banner of Denmark (14th Century).svg | link alias-estridsen = Kingdom of Denmark (Middle Ages) | flag alias-medieval = State Banner of Denmark (14th Century).svg | link alias-medieval = Kingdom of Denmark (Middle Ages) | flag alias-civil = Flag of Denmark.svg | flag alias-royal = Royal Standard of Denmark.svg | link alias-royal = Royal Standard of Denmark | flag alias-naval = Naval Ensign of Denmark.svg | link alias-naval = Royal Danish Navy | flag alias-air force = Flag of Denmark (state).svg | link alias-air force= Royal Danish Air Force | flag alias-army = Flag of Denmark (state).svg | link alias-army = Royal Danish Army | flag alias-navy = Naval Ensign of Denmark.svg | link alias-navy = Royal Danish Navy | border-civil = yes | flag alias-3:2 = Flag of Denmark (3-2).svg | shortname alias = Denmark | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = viking | var2 = estridsen | var3 = medieval | var4 = civil | var5 = royal | redir1 = DK | redir2 = the Kingdom of Denmark | related1 = Denmark | related2 = Faroe Islands | related3 = Greenland | related4 = Danelaw | related5 = North Sea Empire | cat = Denmark kingdom </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Denmark here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Kingdom_of_Denmark for full history.
